headline: Agoda Marks 11th Tech Camp Day with Agentic AI Focus
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda hosted the 11th edition of Tech Camp Day, its award-winning tech-focused social impact initiative designed to upskill high school and university students in emerging technology fields, in collaboration with Thailand's Ministry of Higher Education, Science, Research and Innovation (MHESI). Held over two days at Agoda's new One Bangkok office on 16 and 17 July, the program brought together more than 400 students from 12 universities, bringing Tech Camp Day's total rea
